name: ui-skills
description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. Reads actual computed CSS, DOM structure, JS interactions, and animations — not just a screenshot. Auto-detects responsive breakpoints via viewport sweep. Verifies output with frame comparison (static, scroll, interaction) and mandatory pixel-perfect numerical diff (getComputedStyle, mismatches: 0 required). Includes sub-skills for precise animation extraction (WAAPI, canvas/WebGL, scroll-driven JS), visual baseline capture & comparison with trigger-type-aware recording, and corrected video sync.
